description: Direct and iterative solution of linear and nonlinear systems and of eigenproblems. LU and symmetric LU factorization. Complexity, stability, and conditioning. Nonlinear systems. Iterative methods for linear systems. QR-factorization and least squares. Eigenproblems: local and global methods.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (MATH 340,341, or375) and (COMP SCI 200,300, 301, 302,310, or placement intoCOMP SCI 300) or graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) program
